name: codeforge
description: Initial backend scaffold for code execution service

scripts.start:core: concurrently -k -n API,WORKER -c cyan,green "npm run start" "npm run start:worker"
scripts.start:services: concurrently -k -n API,WORKER,RETRY,HEALTH,AUTOSCALE -c cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue "npm run start" "npm run start:worker" "npm run retry:processor" "npm run worker:health-monitor" "npm run worker:autoscaler"
scripts.setup:all: npm run db:init && npm run db:migrate && npm run runners:build
scripts.start:all: npm run setup:all && npm run start:services
scripts.runners:clean: powershell -NoProfile -Command "docker image rm -f codeforge/runner-python3:latest codeforge/runner-nodejs20:latest codeforge/runner-java17:latest codeforge/runner-cpp20:latest"
